text.title: nodejs-patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Pre-application gate + auth branch. Drives the agent from the input set to either a scoped scaffold-spec call or a documented skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the task target an HTTP-serving Node ≥ 20 + Express ∈ {4.x, 5.x} service?

branch.conclusion: Skip this methodology. Recommend the runtime-appropriate alternative (Hono for edge, Fastify for high-throughput, NestJS if the team committed to it).
Emit scaffold-spec without middleware/auth.ts. error_classes has 3 entries (AppError, NotFoundError, ValidationError).

branch.question: Is this a greenfield service or a refactor of existing code?

branch.conclusion: Emit full scaffold-spec including UnauthorizedError. folder_tree includes middleware/auth.ts. Proceed to step 6 (validate).
Emit scaffold-spec AND a diff plan against the existing repo's current middleware order. Reviewer must approve diff before codegen runs.

text.example: input: {service_name=billing-api, auth_mode=jwt, greenfield=greenfield, node_version=>=20} q-applicable -> true q-auth-mode -> 'jwt' q-greenfield -> 'greenfield' => conclusion r4-error-class-hierarchy: emit full scaffold-spec with UnauthorizedError + middleware/auth.ts.
